title: 第1節　川面を見下ろすベンチ
chapterTitle: 第2章　桜の折り返し
continuityNotes: This is the Sato-part of the same bench-stretch incident as scene-002-001-001-sera.
Keep the same riverside bench, same river view, and same blossom scatter in both images.
Sato may stretch beside the bench or use the ground or bench back for balance, but he must not place shoes or feet on the seating surface of the bench.
prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第2章　桜の折り返し / 第1話　朝のリズムが整う. Scene focus: 第1節　川面を見下ろすベンチ / サトーパート. Summary: 給水を入れてからしばらく走ると、足と呼吸がようやく同じ場所へ揃ってきた。速すぎず、遅すぎず、勝手に身体が前へ進む感覚がある。ジョギングでいちばん気持ちいいのは、たぶんこの区間だ… Key beats: 給水を入れてからしばらく走ると、足と呼吸がようやく同じ場所へ揃ってきた。速すぎず、遅すぎず、勝手に身体が前へ進む感覚がある。ジョギングでいちばん気持ちいいのは、たぶんこの区間だろうとサトーは思う。走り始めの面倒も、終盤の疲れもまだ遠い。 河川テラスの先には、川面を見下ろせる長いベンチがある。サトーはそこでいったん足を止め、片脚ずつふくらはぎを伸ばした。桜の花びらがベンチの端へ薄く溜まり、風が吹くたびひとひらずつ川へ落ちていく。春の朝というのは、止まってみると案外忙しい。光も風も匂いも、数分ごとに少しずつ変わる。 走っている最中は気づかなかったが、川の表面には細かなさざ波が立っていた。橋脚の影だけが濃く、水際の草は昨日より少し伸びて見える。ほんの小さな変化の積み重ねで季節は進むのだと、こういう朝には妙に実感できた。 上のテラスでは、ベビーカーを止めた人とジョガー風の男が、なにやらもたついた拍子に手すり際へ寄っていた。朝は誰でも少し動きが鈍い。自分も止まりすぎると同じことになりそうだなと、サトーは肩を伸ばす角度だけを整えた。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sato-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sato-part of the same bench-stretch incident as scene-002-001-001-sera. Keep the same riverside bench, same river view, and same blossom scatter in both images. Sato may stretch beside the bench or use the ground or bench back for balance, but he must not place shoes or feet on the seating surface of the bench. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a cute maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Compose a mid-run stretch moment with Sato dominant beside a riverside bench, breathing evenly and looking down at the river with satisfied focus. He may stretch while standing next to the bench or lightly brace against the bench back, but never put his shoes on the bench seat. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato on a terrace edge or behind a railing, distant but readable, never tiny and never companion-like.
